chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 2041 of 2011 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge For directions 1. For orders on CMA No.7019/2021 (U/A) 2. For orders on CMA No.7018/2021 (Rev/App) 3. For orders on CMA No.7020 (Ex./A) 06-10-2021 Mr. Abdul Wahab G. Shaikh, Advocate for the petitioner..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- 1. Urgency is granted. 2 & 3. Application at serial No.2 has been filed seeking review of order dated 08-09-2021. We have heard the learned Counsel and perused the record and have also gone through the said order, and according to us, no case for review is made out. The application along with application at serial No.3 is dismissed with cost of Rs.2,000/- (Rupees two thousand) to be deposited in the account of High Court Clinic. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
